title: Classic single-page marketing site for Coimbatore steam ironing & dry cleaning

requirements.summary: Build a responsive single-page homepage with classic sectioned layout and smooth-scroll navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage renders without errors and is usable on mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints.
Page is structured into clear sections: Hero, Services, Why Choose Us, How It Works, Testimonials, Gallery, Contact.
All copy is in English and refers to Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
Navigation (header links) smoothly scrolls to each section.

file_operations.description: Create the single-page homepage composition with the required sections (Hero, Services, Why Choose Us, How It Works, Testimonials, Gallery, Contact) and section anchor IDs for navigation.

Create a responsive sticky header with in-page anchor links to each section for smooth scrolling (no additional pages/routes). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Button) for consistent styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a simple footer consistent with the classic theme (business name + location mention) and optional quick links to sections.
Add global styles to support the classic layout, including smooth scrolling behavior and consistent section spacing (e.g., set scroll-behavior and shared section padding/margins).

requirements.summary: Implement a coherent classic visual theme (typography, colors, spacing) avoiding blue/purple primary.
acceptanceCriteria: Typography uses a classic, readable pairing (e.g., serif headings + sans body, or an equivalent classic pairing).
Color palette feels classic/professional (e.g., warm neutrals, charcoal, off-white, subtle gold/emerald accents) and avoids blue/purple as the primary theme.
Buttons, cards, section headers, and spacing are consistent across sections.

file_operations.description: Add classic font loading (serif for headings + sans for body) and apply to the document for consistent typography across the site.
Define classic theme tokens using CSS variables (shadcn-style) and base typography rules; ensure primary/accent colors are not blue/purple and spacing is consistent site-wide.
Adjust theme extensions if needed to align with the classic palette and typography (keeping the existing CSS-variable-based color system intact).

requirements.summary: Add a Hero section with headline, supporting text, and accessible Call/WhatsApp CTAs.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero includes a headline comparable to “Premium Steam Ironing & Dry Cleaning in Coimbatore” (or an equivalent).
Hero includes two prominent CTA buttons: “Call” (tel: link) and “WhatsApp” (wa.me link).
CTA buttons are accessible (keyboard focus styles, discernible text).

file_operations.description: Implement the Hero section with one H1, short supporting text referencing Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India, and two primary CTAs (tel: and wa.me). Use shadcn-ui Button for accessible, consistent CTAs; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire HeroSection into the top of the single-page layout and ensure it is the only H1 on the page.
Centralize business placeholders (phone, WhatsApp number, address placeholder, hours placeholder) and key copy so CTAs and Contact section share consistent values.

requirements.summary: Create a Services section with exactly 5 service cards and short descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Exactly the 5 specified services are displayed.
Each service appears as a visually consistent card with title + 1–2 sentence description.
Cards are responsive (grid adapts across breakpoints).

file_operations.description: Render exactly five service cards: Steam Ironing, Dry Cleaning, Stain Removal, Darning, Saree Pleating & Ironing; each with a 1–2 sentence description. Use shadcn-ui Card for consistent card styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire ServicesSection into the page and ensure its section has a stable anchor ID used by header navigation.
Add the services list (titles + short descriptions) as content data used by ServicesSection.

requirements.summary: Add a trust-building 'Why Choose Us' section with 4–6 local, garment-care highlights.
acceptanceCriteria: Section shows 4–6 bullet points or mini-cards.
Copy is specific to garment care and local trust (not generic tech/product phrasing).

file_operations.description: Create a classic trust/highlights section (4–6 items) focused on fabric-safe handling, saree experience, transparent pricing, and local reliability in Coimbatore. Use shadcn-ui Card (or similar) for consistent highlight styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire WhyChooseUsSection into the page with an anchor ID for smooth-scroll navigation.
Add the Why Choose Us highlights as editable content data to keep copy consistent and localized.

requirements.summary: Add a 'How It Works' section with 3–4 steps, phrased as options (non-committal about pickup/delivery).
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays 3–4 steps in order.
Language does not guarantee pickup/delivery; it is phrased as options (e.g., “Drop-off or contact us” / “Pickup/Delivery (if available)”).

file_operations.description: Implement a 3–4 step process section with carefully worded, non-committal pickup/delivery phrasing (e.g., 'Drop-off or contact us', 'Pickup/Delivery (if available)'). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card) for consistent step styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire HowItWorksSection into the page with an anchor ID for navigation.
Add the ordered steps as content data so wording stays consistent and easy to update.

requirements.summary: Add a Testimonials section with 3 realistic placeholder reviews, no real-person attribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Three testimonials render consistently and look credible.
No real-person names or unverifiable claims are included.

file_operations.description: Render three text-only testimonials with professional, realistic tone and anonymous attribution (e.g., 'Local customer'). Use shadcn-ui Card for consistent layout; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire TestimonialsSection into the page with an anchor ID for navigation.
Add three anonymous testimonial entries as content data (no real names; avoid unverifiable claims).

requirements.summary: Add a Gallery section with a responsive grid of free stock images relevant to the business.
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery displays at least 6 images in a responsive grid.
Images are optimized for the web (reasonable file sizes, correct dimensions, object-fit handling).
Each image includes meaningful alt text in English.

file_operations.description: Create a responsive gallery grid rendering the required free stock images from static paths, with object-fit handling and meaningful English alt text. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card) if needed for consistent framing; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire GallerySection into the page with an anchor ID for navigation.
Add the generated hero image asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-steam-iron.dim_1600x900.jpg.
Add the generated gallery image asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-laundry-stack.dim_1200x800.jpg.
Add the generated gallery image asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-dry-cleaning-rack.dim_1200x800.jpg.
Add the generated gallery image asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-saree-pleats.dim_1200x800.jpg.
Add the generated gallery image asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-stain-removal.dim_1200x800.jpg.
Add the generated gallery image asset at the exact path frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-darning-needlework.dim_1200x800.jpg.

Add the gallery image list (static paths + alt text) so the GallerySection renders at least 6 images, including: frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-laundry-stack.dim_1200x800.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-dry-cleaning-rack.dim_1200x800.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-saree-pleats.dim_1200x800.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-stain-removal.dim_1200x800.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-darning-needlework.dim_1200x800.jpg, and optionally reuse frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-steam-iron.dim_1600x900.jpg.

requirements.summary: Add a Contact section with business details placeholders and Call/WhatsApp actions; no maps.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact section contains: phone placeholder, WhatsApp placeholder, address placeholder, hours placeholder.
Call and WhatsApp actions are functional links (tel: and wa.me).
No map embed or geolocation features are included.

file_operations.description: Implement a contact/details section showing placeholders for phone, WhatsApp, address in Coimbatore, and business hours, plus a short note about services; include functional tel: and wa.me links and do not include any map widgets. Use shadcn-ui Button for the contact actions; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire ContactSection into the page with an anchor ID for navigation.
Store Contact section placeholders (phone, WhatsApp number, address placeholder, hours placeholder, short services note) used by Hero and Contact sections.

requirements.summary: Add on-page SEO: document title, meta description, and correct heading hierarchy.
acceptanceCriteria: Document title mentions the service and Coimbatore.
Meta description is present and relevant.
Only one H1 exists on the page; sections use H2 headings.

file_operations.description: Update the document title to include the service and Coimbatore, and add a meta description relevant to steam ironing, laundry, and dry cleaning in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
Ensure the page uses exactly one H1 (in the Hero) and all other section titles are H2s (or appropriate subheadings beneath H2s).

requirements.summary: Serve generated images as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly from the frontend.
acceptanceCriteria: All required generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Frontend references images via static paths (e.g., /assets/generated/...).
No backend code is introduced for image serving.

file_operations.description: Reference the hero image via a static path corresponding to frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-steam-iron.dim_1600x900.jpg and ensure it is rendered without involving any backend routing.

Reference gallery images via static paths corresponding to: frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-laundry-stack.dim_1200x800.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-dry-cleaning-rack.dim_1200x800.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-saree-pleats.dim_1200x800.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-stain-removal.dim_1200x800.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-darning-needlework.dim_1200x800.jpg (and optionally frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-steam-iron.dim_1600x900.jpg), ensuring the UI uses direct static asset paths.
